name: General Productivity Prompts
description: Essential prompts for everyday productivity and task management

prompts.title: Task Breakdown Assistant
prompts.description: Break down complex tasks into manageable steps
prompts.content: Help me break down this complex task into smaller, actionable steps: {{task_description}}. Consider the timeline: {{timeline}} and available resources: {{resources}}. Provide a clear step-by-step plan with priorities.

variables.name: task_description
variables.description: The complex task you want to break down

examples.output:
Team Retreat Planning - 6 Week Timeline:

Week 1-2: Planning & Research
1. Survey team for preferences and dates
2. Research venues within budget
3. Create preliminary agenda

Week 3-4: Booking & Coordination
4. Book venue and accommodations
5. Arrange transportation
6. Confirm speakers/facilitators

...

prompts.title: Email Summarizer
prompts.description: Summarize long emails or email threads into key points

variables.name: email_content
variables.description: The email or email thread content to summarize
variables.example: Long email conversation about project updates

input.email_content: Hi team, following up on yesterday's meeting about the Q2 marketing campaign. Sarah mentioned we need to finalize the budget by Friday. Tom will handle the creative brief and needs input from design by Tuesday. The launch date is still set for March 15th but we might need to push to March 22nd if the legal review takes longer...

examples.output:
**Key Points:**
• Q2 marketing campaign planning in progress
• Budget finalization required
• Creative brief in development
• Launch date under review

**Action Items:**
• Sarah: Finalize budget by Friday
• Tom: Complete creative brief
• Design team: Provide input by Tuesday
• Legal: Complete review ASAP

**Important Dates:**
• March 15th: Target launch date
• March 22nd: Backup launch date

prompts.title: Meeting Agenda Generator
prompts.description: Create structured meeting agendas with time allocations

variables.name: meeting_purpose
variables.description: The main purpose or goal of the meeting

variables.name: duration
variables.description: How long the meeting will be

variables.name: topics
variables.description: Key topics or issues to discuss
variables.example: Sprint progress, blockers, next week planning

prompts.title: Decision Making Framework
prompts.description: Structured approach to making difficult decisions

variables.name: decision
variables.description: The decision you need to make
variables.example: Which marketing channel to invest in

variables.name: context
variables.description: Background information relevant to the decision
variables.example: B2B SaaS startup, limited budget, need leads

variables.name: constraints
variables.example: Budget under $10k, must show ROI within 3 months

prompts.title: Learning Plan Creator
prompts.description: Design a structured learning plan for acquiring new skills

variables.name: time_commitment
variables.description: How much time you can dedicate
